title: AEMO BESS Fleet Dispatch Conformance and FCAS Performance Audit
description: Level 1 data integrity, Level 2 dispatch conformance verification, and Level 3 contingency FCAS performance audit for the 16-unit Australian BESS fleet (>=50 MW) across the 12-month window (June 2025 – May 2026) under the VolMax P10 Verification Protocol. The audit uses 5-minute SCADA, dispatch load targets, and high-resolution grid frequency telemetry to evaluate conformance targets, cross-jurisdictional generalization, and FCAS response.
notes: Final verdicts: ES-AU-01: Verified (with Descriptive Band), ES-AU-02: Not Verified (Hypothesis Rejected), ES-AU-03: Unfalsifiable / Not Publicly Auditable.
